fields.label: Coverage Note
fields.description: Why a scan is partial/incomplete (turn envelope hit, engagement inputs unconfigured, etc.). Never let a partial scan read as a clean all-clear.

fields.label: Session Key
fields.description: The opaque per-run Jarvis Chat Session key minted for this run (e.g. agent:<slug>:<run>). Resolves the run-as user for the delegate's jarvis__* calls. Bearer-sensitive; torn down after the run (Phase 4).

fields.label: Dashboard
fields.description: The saved Jarvis Dashboard this run produced (programmatic Run->Dashboard, Phase 4).

fields.label: Coverage JSON
fields.description: Per-rule coverage manifest {token: evaluated|not_evaluable(reason)|truncated} written back by the evaluator (A16). Gates coverage-scoped auto-resolve.

fields.label: Scope JSON
fields.description: The explicit resolved scope {company, fiscal_year, from_date, to_date, prior_fy_start, prior_fy_end} stamped at launch (A6). Injected verbatim into the run message so the container never infers dates.

fields.label: Watermark GL Row Count
fields.description: A17 consistency watermark: count of GL Entry rows for the scope company with posting_date <= to_date, as of launch. Recomputed at writeback; a mismatch marks the run partial (GL changed mid-scan).

fields.label: Watermark GL Max Modified
fields.description: A17 consistency watermark: max(GL Entry.modified) for the scope, as of launch.

fields.label: Permission Profile
fields.description: A summary + sha256 of the run-as user's roles + user-permission keys at launch (A12). Lets a drift between mapping-time and run-time perms be detected.

fields.label: Integrity Digest
fields.description: The evaluator's sha256 over its canonicalized findings (A1), passed through record_agent_run. Two runs on unchanged data must produce the same digest — the reproducibility proof stored alongside the run.

fields.label: Canvas Ref
fields.description: The delegate's saved canvas/dashboard reference reported at writeback. Phase 4's save_dashboard resolves this into the Run.dashboard link.
